title: digitaria ciliaris var. fimbriata
intro: Digitaria ciliaris var. fimbriata, also known as finger grass, is a type of grass belonging to the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in wound healing. Digitaria ciliaris var. fimbriata can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
